properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Purview Signals in Sentinel

This workbook summarizes Microsoft Purview DLP and Insider Risk alerts surfaced in this Sentinel workspace, plus sensitivity-label activity from Office 365 audit."},"name":"header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ProductName has 'Data Loss Prevention' or ProductName has 'Insider Risk'
| summarize count() by AlertSeverity, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Purview alerts by severity (7d)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"purview-alerts-timechart"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ProductName has 'Data Loss Prevention' or ProductName has 'Insider Risk'
| extend user = tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Name)
| summarize alertCount=count() by user
| top 10 by alertCount desc","size":0,"title":"Top users by Purview alert volume","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"top-users"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where Operation startswith 'SensitivityLabel'
| summarize count() by Operation, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Sensitivity label activity (7d)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"label-activity"}]}
